text.message: And yeah red, blacks about to have wood port
I think I’m gonna get plowed?
Man I had to trade two of my best cards for that
He’s about to go wood port
If you block the 10 wheat again I’m going to solo you guys
And he has wood port and double brick
Block the 5 brick so I can contest toad
If he doesn’t get road or army
But not going to be extorted when a guy has op placements
Is it seriously the 1750 elo where people realize making enemies is worse
Just solidified his fate with that
And you still try to double plow 4th
Blue you and I taking 4th and 3rd baby
Been over since placements and you guys decided to not work together
Just want you to know that
